news.title: Frieren 1.3.0 Released
news.description: Module dependency installs rebuilt on background tasks with live logs, a new shared loading component, HTML support in news, an end-to-end test suite, and backend hardening.

news.title: Scan Module Complete
news.description: The scanning module is now complete and available as a closed beta exclusively for Patreon supporters. More info: Patreon post

news.title: Frieren 1.2.0 Released
news.description: Polish and reliability update: skeleton loaders, toast feedback everywhere, system update from dashboard, cache busting, backend security hardening, and major frontend/backend refactors.

news.title: Frieren 1.1.0 Released
news.description: Major update: new Packages manager, wireless module rewrite, terminal rewrite with theme support and autologin, news feed, refreshed UI, and new developer tools.

news.title: Frieren 1.0.0 Released
news.description: First public release. Dashboard, Hardware diagnostics, Login, Modules manager, Settings, Terminal, and Wireless management.

lastVersion.comment: Module dependency installs rebuilt on background tasks with live logs, shared loading component, HTML news support, e2e test suite, and backend hardening.
